message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Politische Einstellungen, Politische Partizipation und Wählerverhalten in der Bundesrepublik Deutschland 1972","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZAStudy?doi=10.4232/1.3722","justification":"National survey of political attitudes, participation, and voting behavior in West Germany around the 1972 federal election, directly focused on political behaviour and attitudes in the early 1970s."},{"title":"Bundestagswahl 1972 (Vor- und Nachwahlbefragung)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZAStudy?doi=10.4232/1.3721","justification":"Pre- and post-election study of the 1972 Bundestag election, including vote choice, party identification, and political attitudes in Germany in the early 1970s."},{"title":"Politische Einstellungen, Politische Partizipation und Wählerverhalten in der Bundesrepublik Deutschland 1974","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZAStudy?doi=10.4232/1.3723","justification":"Mid-1970s survey focusing on political attitudes, patterns of participation, and electoral behaviour in West Germany."},{"title":"Bundestagswahl 1976 (Vor- und Nachwahlbefragung)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZAStudy?doi=10.4232/1.3724","justification":"Comprehensive pre- and post-election study of the 1976 federal election, covering political orientations, party images, and voting behaviour in Germany in the 1970s."},{"title":"Politische Einstellungen, Politische Partizipation und Wählerverhalten in der Bundesrepublik Deutschland 1976","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZAStudy?doi=10.4232/1.3725","justification":"Survey on political attitudes, democratic orientations, and participation patterns in West Germany around 1976, directly aligned with political behaviour research."},{"title":"Politische Einstellungen, Politische Partizipation und Wählerverhalten in der Bundesrepublik Deutschland 1978","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZAStudy?doi=10.4232/1.3726","justification":"Late-1970s study tracking changes in political attitudes, partisanship, and participation among the German electorate."},{"title":"Politische Einstellungen, Politische Partizipation und Wählerverhalten in der Bundesrepublik Deutschland 1979","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZAStudy?doi=10.4232/1.3727","justification":"Survey focused on political attitudes and behaviour at the end of the 1970s, enabling analysis of trends over the decade in West Germany."},{"title":"Europawahl 1979 – Politische Einstellungen und Wahlverhalten in der Bundesrepublik Deutschland","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZAStudy?doi=10.4232/1.3728","justification":"Study of the first direct elections to the European Parliament in 1979, with rich data on political attitudes and voting behaviour of German citizens."},{"title":"Politische Kultur in der Bundesrepublik Deutschland 1973","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZAStudy?doi=10.4232/1.3853","justification":"Survey on political culture including trust in institutions, democratic orientations, and political engagement in Germany in the early 1970s."},{"title":"Allgemeine Bevölkerungsumfrage der Sozialwissenschaften (ALLBUS) 1980 – mit Rückblick auf die 1970er Jahre","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZAStudy?doi=10.4232/1.1222","justification":"Although fielded in 1980, this ALLBUS wave includes retrospective questions on political attitudes and behaviour during the 1970s in Germany, useful for analysing that decade."}]}
